Memory API

The Memory type is the main entry point for Mem0.jl. It orchestrates LLM-based fact extraction, embedding, vector search, optional graph memory, and history tracking.

Memory Type

Mem0.Memory — Type
Memory

The main Mem0 memory system. Orchestrates LLM-based fact extraction, embedding, vector search, optional graph memory, and history tracking.

Adding Memories

Mem0.add — Function
add(mem, messages; user_id=nothing, agent_id=nothing, run_id=nothing,
    metadata=nothing, infer=true, memory_type=nothing, prompt=nothing)

Create new memories from messages. When infer=true (default), the LLM extracts facts from the conversation, deduplicates against existing memories, and decides whether to ADD, UPDATE, or DELETE. When infer=false, messages are stored directly.

Returns a Dict with "results" and optionally "relations" keys.

Searching Memories

Mem0.search — Function
search(mem, query; user_id=nothing, agent_id=nothing, run_id=nothing,
       limit=100, filters=nothing, threshold=nothing)

Search memories by semantic similarity.

Returns a Dict with "results" and optionally "relations" keys.

Updating Memories

Mem0.update — Function
update(mem, memory_id, data; metadata=nothing)

Update an existing memory's content and optionally its metadata.

Deleting Memories

Mem0.delete — Function
delete(mem, memory_id)

Delete a memory by ID.

Retrieving Memories

Mem0.get_memory — Function
get_memory(mem, memory_id)

Retrieve a single memory by ID.

Mem0.get_all — Function
get_all(mem; user_id=nothing, agent_id=nothing, run_id=nothing,
        filters=nothing, limit=100)

Get all memories for given session IDs.

History

Mem0.history — Function
history(mem, memory_id)

Get the change history for a specific memory.

Resetting

Mem0.reset! — Function
reset!(mem)

Reset all memories (vector store + graph + history).
